text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Build backend API (backend/ with Hono)","description":"Create the backend BFF API in backend/ directory:

1. **Project setup**: 
   - backend/package.json with Hono, @anthropic-ai/sdk, @hono/node-server, dotenv, zod
   - backend/tsconfig.json
   - backend/src/index.ts - Hono entry point with CORS

2. **Routes** (backend/src/routes/):
   - interpretation.ts: POST /api/interpret/saju, POST /api/interpret/gunghap, POST /api/interpret/daily
   - All return SSE streaming responses from Claude API
   - Input validation with Zod schemas

3. **Claude service** (backend/src/services/claude.ts):
   - Claude API client using @anthropic-ai/sdk
   - streamInterpretation(prompt, systemPrompt) → SSE stream
   - Error handling and timeout

4. **Prompts** (backend/src/prompts/):
   - saju.ts: 사주풀이 prompt template - "청월선생" persona (40년 경력 명리학 대가, 따뜻하고 지혜로운 말투)
     - Takes structured saju data (팔자, 오행분포, 십신배치) as markdown table
     - Requests 5 sections: 성격/재물/직업/연애/건강
   - gunghap.ts: 궁합 prompt - compare two saju, category scores + narrative
   - daily.ts: 일일 운세 prompt - concise, category-based fortune + lucky info

5. **Middleware** (backend/src/middleware/):
   - cors.ts: CORS configuration
   - rate-limit.ts: Basic in-memory rate limiting

6. **backend/.env.example** with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY placeholder

Working directory: /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/
NOTE: This is independent of the mobile app structure - can be built in parallel after Task 1.","assignedBy":"backend-dev","timestamp":"2026-02-28T06:01:07.687Z"}

{"type":"shutdown_request","requestId":"shutdown-1772258687168@backend-dev","from":"team-lead","reason":"Task #3 is complete. Great work on the backend! Please shut down.","timestamp":"2026-02-28T06:04:47.168Z"}
